sidebar.title: Search Ads Auction Simulator
sidebar.why_this_matters: Demand capture has hidden rails: a search result is not just a list, it is an auction shaped by bid prices, quality scores, platform rules, and advertiser economics.
sidebar.who_controls: The platform algorithm controls rank and price, forcing advertisers to compete through both spend and quality signals before they can reach demand.

rows.insight: Northstar Retail is synthetic and demonstrates the top position created by bid and quality score.

notes: All advertiser records are synthetic and labeled for demonstration.
Fallback data keeps the demo functional when live simulation fails.
